title: Align worktree-ensure with the Bureau exact-lease contract
goal: Make the Grabowski worktree-ensure grip acquire and validate the exact target-path and short Bureau worktree-admin leases required by Bureau Always-open Lease Contract v2, without requesting the deprecated global Bureau repository lease.

acceptance.assertion: For Bureau worktrees, worktree-ensure requires the exact target path lease and the bounded path:/home/alex/repos/bureau/.bureau-scopes/worktree-admin effect gate, and does not request repo:/home/alex/repos/bureau for normal work.
The grip derives or validates the current Bureau lease contract before mutation and fails closed with actionable required resource keys when the contract is unavailable or incompatible.
Existing matching worktrees remain idempotent, while branch, head, path or ownership mismatches remain blocked without cleanup or takeover.
Tests cover Bureau v2 exact leases, non-Bureau repositories, missing target-path lease, missing worktree-admin gate, deprecated broad lease rejection, replay and post-state readback.
A live Bureau worktree is created through worktree-ensure using only the current exact leases, then its short worktree-admin gate is released while the target-path ownership remains intact.

metadata.source: Bureau canonical Registry root v2 implementation
metadata.observed_failure: worktree-ensure returned REJECTED_BY_LEASE because it required both the target path and deprecated repo:/home/alex/repos/bureau; direct exact-lease acquisition and typed git worktree creation then succeeded.
